/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -W -Wall -Wextra -O3 -march=native -mtune=native -s -fvisibility=hidden -flto -fwhole-program -Wl,--strip-all --no-gnu-unique -fno-rtti -std=c++2a -shared  -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gamesneeze.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libgamesneeze.so -o libgamesneeze.so CMakeFiles/gamesneeze.dir/src/core/features/antiaim.cpp.o
